ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently or has been associated with */,
  "esport_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the esports title the player competes in */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the player is associated with */,
  "date_joined_team" TEXT /* Date the player joined the current team */,
  "date_left_team" TEXT /* Date the player left the current team (if applicable) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the player */,
  "secondary_role" TEXT /* Secondary role of the player */,
  "years_active" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been active */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_esport_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("esport_title_id") REFERENCES esport_titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "esport_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the esports title the team competes in */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "current_roster_size" INTEGER /* Current number of players in the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_esport_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("esport_title_id") REFERENCES esport_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series or tournament */,
  "esport_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the esports title the series involves */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the series (e.g., Bo3, Bo5) */,
  "total_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score of the player in the series */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the player's score in the series */,
  "exp_score" REAL /* Expected score of the player in the series */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total kills of the player in the series */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths of the player in the series */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists of the player in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score of the team in the series */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the team's score in the series */,
  "exp_score" REAL /* Expected score of the team in the series */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins of the team in the series */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses of the team in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player left */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player joined */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_composition_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_composition_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "esport_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each esports title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the esports title */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the title */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the title */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's associated team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES player_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., player transfer, team restructuring) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., performance update, transfer) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., Bo3, Bo5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_schedules_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_schedules_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_schedules_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule entry */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES series_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
